testcase.name: TC003 - Add Contact details
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.....................................passed When user enter username..................................................passed When user enter password..................................................passed When user click on Login button...........................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application.............................passed Given user is on dashbrd page.............................................passed When user click on My Info tab............................................passed Then viewPersonalDetails page is displayed with all personal details of...passed When user click on Contact Details subtab.................................passed Then ContactDetails page is displayed.....................................passed When user enter steet1 "123 Street".......................................passed When user enter city "Los Angeles"........................................passed When user enter state "CA"................................................passed When user enter zip code "54321"..........................................passed When user enter country "Angola"..........................................passed When user enter mobile "7654320912".......................................passed When user enter work phone "11114455339"..................................passed When user enter work email "cc@ccmail.com"................................passed When user click on Save button............................................passed Then Contact Details is saved successfully................................passed

testcase.name: TC003 - Add Contact details [1]
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.....................................passed When user enter username..................................................passed When user enter password..................................................passed When user click on Login button...........................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application.............................passed Given user is on dashbrd page.............................................passed When user click on My Info tab............................................passed Then viewPersonalDetails page is displayed with all personal details of...passed When user click on Contact Details subtab.................................passed Then ContactDetails page is displayed.....................................passed When user enter steet1 "45 Street"........................................passed When user enter city "New York City"......................................passed When user enter state "MH"................................................passed When user enter zip code "67899"..........................................passed When user enter country "Algeria".........................................passed When user enter mobile "9876543210".......................................passed When user enter work phone "0123456789"...................................passed When user enter work email "test@xcmail.com"..............................passed When user click on Save button............................................passed Then Contact Details is saved successfully................................passed
